caption: A person is seen opening a pack of sports cards on a table featuring a red and white logo and the word "BREAK". The person wears a dark-colored shirt and uses their hands to tear open a purple and silver foil pack. On the back of the pack, "NBA.com" and a barcode are visible. As the pack opens, a basketball player in a white uniform appears on the front, along with the text "15 CARDS" and "'21-22 NBA TRADING CARDS". A small inset video shows a man with a beard wearing a black shirt, sitting in a room with equipment. Overlaying the scene is a chat window with messages from users like "glowdog07" and "Nightly". One message reads, "CLICK the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE >>> https://bit.ly/3ZzaxX4". The scene progresses from gripping the sealed pack to fully opening it.
